## Checklist
- [ ] Content is accurate and has been tested/validated
- [ ] MITRE ATT&CK tactic/technique tagged (if applicable)
- [ ] Cross-links to related playbooks/runbooks added
- [ ] Reviewed by at least one other SOC team member
- [ ] No sensitive data (real IPs, credentials, customer info) included
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly (preview checked)
- [ ] CI checks pass (markdownlint, link check)
